stemHtml: Which of the following applications uses a VHF Data Broadcast (VDB)?

options.a: Receive ATC instructions as part of a Controller-Pilot Data Link Communication (CPDLC) system.
options.b: Transmit error correction factors and integrity information as part of a Ground-Based Augmentation System (GBAS).
options.c: Transmit and receive Aircraft-Based Augmentation System (ABAS) signal that can be used to augment the data provided by the primary GNSS.
options.d: Receive Satellite-Based Augmentation System (SBAS) signals that can be used to determine the pseudo-range as if they were part of a GPS satellite constellation.
